lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that cape you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: This is a Skillcape of Farming, isn't it incredible? It's a symbol of my ability as the finest farmer in the land and wearing it increases my herb yield!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy a Skillcape of Farming from you?

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Of course, fellow farmer. If you wear this cape you'll receive increased yields from your herbs. That'll be 99000 coins.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: No skin off my teeth, but if you change your mind, the price will still be the same.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, not many people own one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But, unfortunately, I don't have enough money with me.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Well, come back and see me when you do.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: That's true; us Master Farmers are a unique breed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: May I have another hood for my cape, please?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, this time I've really solved your problems! I've woken up the Fairy Queen!

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Hmm, right. You'll forgive me if I reserve judgement on this until I actually have some crops grow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course. The problem was the Godfather, he wanted to take control of Zanaris himself, so he didn't give Fairy Nuff the Queen's secateurs!

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Godfather...Fairy Nuff...the Queen, I don't know what you're talking about and I don't care. I just want my crops to start growing again. Come back and claim your reward once they've had a chance to grow.

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: Cor blimey mate, what are ye doing in me pockets?

sections.title: Talking to him after successfully pickpocketing him recently

lines.speaker: Martin the Master Gardener
lines.text: You're the thief who stole from me!
